evidence_summary: The search party locates the Scarecrow's discarded clothing high in a smooth-trunked tree. The Tin Woodman uses his new gold-handled axe to fell the tree, allowing the group to retrieve the clothes and restuff them with fresh straw to physically restore the...

The search party finds the Scarecrow's discarded clothes in a tall tree. Using his new axe, the Tin Woodman chops down the tree. They retrieve the clothes, restuff them with fresh straw, and restore the Scarecrow to life.
From loss/despair to triumph and joy.
Characters looking up at empty clothes hanging in a tall tree with expressions of despair.
The Scarecrow is fully stuffed and standing, surrounded by a joyful group.
Felling the tree to retrieve clothing and stuffing the straw back into the character.
